{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Arbiter
| introduced = tg-02-crimson-vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Arbiters are among the most powerful beings a [[Naraka Traveler]] can summon.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c23">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]]'s appearance was like an [[Arbiter]] of [[Naraka]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c23">''City of Light'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate concepts]]
